releases.author: mddevils
releases.description:
Changelog:

Changed class name:
'my-plugin-ribbon-class' to 'floccus-bookmarks-to-md-icon'

Added `await` to 'createFolder', 'rename' and 'trash' calls

Added `async` to 'backupExistingFile'

Removed:
containerEl.createEl('h2', { text: 'Floccus Bookmarks to Markdown Settings' });

Thanks @ericaxu for the feedback.

releases.author: mddevils
releases.description: First release of Floccus Bookmarks to Markdown
